name: dvm_monthly
_note: The methodology v2.2 DVM/momentum screen, now expressible thanks to the Trendlyne fundamentals snapshot. Screens on Durability>50, mcap 500-50000cr, P/E <= 2.5x sector, promoter pledge < 20%, trend (>50 & >200 DMA), liquidity (ADTV>=10cr), excludes Banking & Finance; ranks by 12-week price momentum (roc125). Fundamentals are snapshot-only, so this is a LIVE-SIGNALS strategy (run it on /signals) - a historical backtest is gated to NaN before the snapshot by design. The full percentile-blend scoring isn't replicated in a single rank expression.
